title: Project Life on Two Peas
excerpt: Ironic that my last video featured a trip abroad, while this week I was challenged with being in a new house with limited supplies. My studio won't be set up for another couple weeks (right around the same time the…
body:
Ironic that my last video featured a trip abroad, while this week I was challenged with being in a new house with limited supplies. My studio won't be set up for another couple weeks (right around the same time the baby is due), so I had to work on the coffee table. And I had my friend Kara in town to help out. The week highlighted was from June and included a mix of being in town and going to Utah for the weekend for the I Heart Memories retreat. Here are some of the photos I couldn't get into the spread. One of the things I loved about the event was that people flew in from all over the country. In fact, there were a few girls from Hawaii and lots of familiar faces from different places. A woman who I met while teaching in Pittsburgh was there. And the people putting the event together were just top notch - it was awesome. Here is a great wrap up post from The Painted Crane.And because someone will ask, the blue camera isn't mine, but can be purchased online - Fujifilm Instax Cameras are awesome. Here is the spread:If you'd like to take a look at how this spread came together, check out this video.

Limited supplies and Enlisting a Friend for Project Life | copyright Two Peas In A Bucket
